stemHtml: What best describes a "visual approach" for an IFR flight?

options.a: An approach where part or all of the instrument procedure is not completed, flown visually.
options.b: A visual manoeuvre when destination weather doesn't permit IFR.
options.c: An approach by an IFR flight unable to maintain VMC.
options.d: An extension of an instrument approach to position for landing.
